posts.text: IKS completion of Trubridge is maybe a week or so away from now. Q1 results and concall are also around the corner. Maybe the management will choose to address the synergies in more quantified terms in the investor presentation. I hope so. The strategic blueprint and layout I wouldn’t expect before q2 presentation. They would like to test the waters for few months before they open up. Would like to see how Q1 shapes up in CC growth YoY and the new deals. The only real question I have on IKS is their ability to do sales, particularly the cross sell from Aquity. This will be the crux in seeing t…
